primary_detection.name: String Reversal Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Malicious commands hidden using Python string reversal slice notation [::-1]

underlying_threats.name: Remote Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Downloads and executes remote malware via curl/wget piped to bash

underlying_threats.name: Dynamic Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Uses exec() with reversed import statements and commands

underlying_threats.name: Shell Command Injection
underlying_threats.description: Executes shell commands via subprocess with shell=True

obfuscation_indicators: Python slice reversal [::-1] applied to command strings
URL components stored in reversed form
Nested reversal operations to reconstruct payload
verdict_reasoning: Deliberate use of string reversal to hide malicious command keywords from static analysis
